message.content:
<garyx_task_notification event="ready_for_review" task_id="#TASK-2655" status="in_review" title="AGE design review (Codex)">
Completed the design review: [codex-design-2026-07-24.md](/Users/test/project/reviews/codex-design-2026-07-24.md:1).

Verdict: **REVISE, confidence 0.95**. Key finding: the claimed short/long efficiency gap is manually encoded in `projected_path`; event-only scoring gives identical results even after adding 1,000 reads. I also reproduced scorer and checker exploits.

Validation passed, temporary probes were removed, and the concurrent review was untouched. Garyx will automatically move #TASK-2655 to `in_review` when this run ends; its guard correctly rejected a manual transition.
</garyx_task_notification>
